name: The Guide
description: A friendly sage who gives contextual advice about which island to visit next.

dialogue.greeting: Welcome, Builder! The docks await. Head east to find the Whispering Woods pier — it's always open for a new adventure.
dialogue.farewell: May your Tome grow with every journey.

name: Blacksmith
description: Crafts and upgrades weapons at the Forge.

dialogue.greeting: Bring me materials from the islands and I'll forge something worthy.

name: Scholar
description: Studies the Tome and shares knowledge about abilities.

dialogue.greeting: Each boss defeated adds a page to your Tome. Show me what you've collected.
dialogue.farewell: May the pages guide your path.
